text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Another impressive victory for Agnes<n>Digital! Just
how many G1s does she<n>plan to take?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We run at every racecourse we can,<n>and Agnes
Digital keeps on winning<n>and winning.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Her acclaim resounds throughout the<n>city.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, we are killin' it. Who'd have<n>thunk I'd
win this much?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't even walk around the city<n>without people
recognizing me and<n>calling me that shhhweet
name...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's Agnes Digital!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Or should I say... the Ruler of the Mile!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Ruler of the Mile? What<n>happened to
All-Rounder?

text_block_list.name: Garoto A
text_block_list.text:
Look! It's the Ruler of the Mile! The<n>Ruler of the
Mile is here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's going on?! Have I<n>entered some kinda
parallel<n>universe?! I'm supposed to be the
All-Rounder...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Curious, we head to the library to<n>check her race
records.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting. So, I looked<n>over the
records to check on that<n>question you had...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Based on your achievements, it<n>appears "Ruler of
the Mile" is an<n>appropriate title.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A junior-year G1 mile, the Oka Sho,<n>the NHK Mile
Cup, the Mile<n>Championship, the February Stakes,
the Victoria Mile, and the Yasuda<n>Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You won all of them. It's an<n>unprecedented record.
Honestly, they<n>should be calling you "Hero of the
Mile."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, talk to me more, Ms. Librarian...<n>And I love...
your glasses...hehe...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Uh? U-ummm...
choice_data_list: Thank you so much for your help!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I stop the conversation from going off<n>the rails. It
seems we unknowingly<n>conquered all the
renowned mile<n>races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is it me? Am I crazy???

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I don't know! Everyone was calling<n>me the
All-Rounder, but now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's not that I don't like<n>people calling me
the Ruler of the<n>Mile. It's just... it might give
people<n>the wrong impression, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Digitan's willing to simp in any<n>distance! Simping
and I go together<n>like Adam and Eve, tops and
bottoms,<n>bad movies and scream queens!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I can't specialize in miles and bean all-rounder, so I'll have to pick oneand stick to it... But which one?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Someone shows up as Agnes Digital<n>ponders her
dilemma...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, if it isn't the Ruler of the Mile!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Look, Flower! It's Digital! She'sreally been on fire lately...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hi, Agnes Digital. I watch all your<n>races. Um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If it's not any trouble, could I pick<n>your brain some
time? I have a lot of<n>respect for you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My brain?! BUT OF COURSE! My mind<n>is an open
book to you, my precious<n>angel!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Who knew my new reputation would<n>allow me to
meet Umas I've barely<n>had the chance to interact
with<n>before?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, I think I can afford<n>to derail a bit!
Heck, I may as well<n>lean into it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mean, isn't that part of being an<n>all-rounder in
the first place?! How<n>could I forget?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can claim as many titles and meet<n>as many
Umamusume as I want!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's decided, Trainer! From here onout, I'm gonna be the Ruler of All !

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I like both, so why reject what'soffered? I should keep this up anddominate all races of all distances!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is far more than just a<n>versatile
runner. She's proven<n>herself to be one of the
fastest in<n>history.
